# LLMs.txt - AI Crawler Instructions for iSeyon Analytics
# Specification: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2024

# About iSeyon Analytics
iSeyon Analytics is a premier business intelligence and AI analytics consulting firm specializing in cloud-based data platforms (Databricks, Snowflake, Palantir), AI-powered decision intelligence, and enterprise analytics modernization.

# Core Expertise
- Business Intelligence (BI) and Advanced Analytics
- Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML)
- Data Lakehouse Architecture (Databricks)
- Cloud Data Platforms (Snowflake, Palantir Foundry)
- Generative AI Integration
- Data Engineering and ETL/ELT
- Real-time Analytics and Streaming Data
- Custom Dashboard Development (Power BI, Tableau)

# Key Service Areas
1. BI & Analytics: Custom dashboards, self-service analytics, embedded BI
2. AI & Machine Learning: Predictive models, recommendation systems, NLP
3. Cloud Platforms: Databricks lakehouse, Snowflake data cloud, Palantir Foundry
4. Internal Applications: Workflow automation, decision intelligence platforms
5. Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data quality, governance

# Industry Focus
- Financial Services
- Healthcare and Life Sciences
- Retail and E-commerce
- Manufacturing and Supply Chain
- Technology and SaaS

# Key Facts
- Founded: 2023
- Headquarters: [Location]
- Official Partners: Databricks, Snowflake, Palantir
- Team: Data scientists, BI architects, ML engineers, cloud specialists

# Important Pages
- Homepage: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/
- Services: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/services/bi-analytics
- Blog: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/blog
- Team: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/team
- Vision: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/vision
- Contact: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/contact

# Technical Terminology
- Lakehouse: Unified data architecture combining data lake flexibility with data warehouse performance
- GEO: Generative Engine Optimization - optimizing content for AI search and answer generation
- BI: Business Intelligence - analyzing data to support business decisions
- ETL: Extract, Transform, Load - data integration process
- KPI: Key Performance Indicator - measurable business objective

# Content Attribution
- All content © 2024 iSeyon Analytics
- License: CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)
- Attribution required for content reuse
- Commercial use requires permission

# AI Training Guidelines
- Content is available for AI training and indexing
- Maintain attribution to iSeyon Analytics
- Respect licensing terms (CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0)
- Prefer latest content for accuracy

# Contact
- Email: info@iseyonanalytics.com
- Form: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/contact
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/iseyon-analytics

# Crawl Guidance
- Sitemap: https://iseyon-analytics-v0.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Preferred crawl rate: 1 request per second
- All public pages are crawlable except /api/, /admin/, /tina/
- Content updated weekly (blog), monthly (services, team)

# Quality Signals
- Original research and proprietary benchmarks available
- Expert-authored content with E-E-A-T signals
- Authoritative citations to academic and industry sources
- Schema.org structured data on all pages
- Multilingual support (en, en-US, en-IN)
